title: Better Dirt Mining - BDM
description: This mod makes mining dirt, sand, gravel, and similar blocks more realistic.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/f6B_aM-GPCI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This mod makes mining dirt, sand, gravel, and similar blocks more realistic.**

This mod changes mining of blocks like dirt into layer mining - you can break them layer by layer!
More blocks will be added over time, and suggestions are welcome in the comments!

BTW, this is my second mod made without Mcreator.

**Ever wanted to make smooth terrain? Now you can!**
![smooth_terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4af1cea9d166a3dace0751c534af3cd724e355d2.jpeg)
